name: gdekod-public-api
description: Публичный API для лендинга gde-code.ru — merchants/coupons read-only

scripts.deploy:merchants-list: yc serverless function version create --function-name gdekod-public-merchants-list --runtime nodejs20 --entrypoint handlers/merchants-list.handler --memory 128m --execution-timeout 10s --source-path .
scripts.deploy:merchant-detail: yc serverless function version create --function-name gdekod-public-merchant-detail --runtime nodejs20 --entrypoint handlers/merchant-detail.handler --memory 128m --execution-timeout 10s --source-path .
scripts.deploy:coupons-list: yc serverless function version create --function-name gdekod-public-coupons-list --runtime nodejs20 --entrypoint handlers/coupons-list.handler --memory 128m --execution-timeout 10s --source-path .
scripts.deploy:coupon-detail: yc serverless function version create --function-name gdekod-public-coupon-detail --runtime nodejs20 --entrypoint handlers/coupon-detail.handler --memory 128m --execution-timeout 10s --source-path .
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:merchants-list && npm run deploy:merchant-detail && npm run deploy:coupons-list && npm run deploy:coupon-detail
